arts.ttl: Leroy Sané putting in extra shifts to secure his Bayern Munich future
arts.sum: Sané is motivated and determined to fight with all his might to get a new contract at Bayern. A couple of Bayern Munich stars are putting in extra work to get ready for the Bundesliga restart.

arts.ttl: Gladbach vs. Bayern Munich: Live stream, game time thread, how to watch
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. A look at the rosters and injuries for Gladbach and Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: ‘I’m more of a leader by example’ – Harry Kane on England’s captain role and what he owes to Wayne Rooney
arts.sum: Harry Kane (31) has opened up to France Football on his role as England captain. The Bayern Munich centre-forward has notably revealed he draws inspiration from former Three Lions skipper…

arts.ttl: Breaking: Bayern Munich youngster Arijon Ibrahimović could be headed to Lazio on loan
arts.sum: According to a report from SportItalia journalist Alfredo Pedulla (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich youngster Arijon Ibrahimović is likely headed to Lazio on loan with the Italian club potentially having an obligation to buy worked into the deal: Bayern and Lazio are in advanced negotiations over a loan deal for Arijon Ibrahimović with a ‘probable’ obligation to buy of around €10m.

arts.ttl: ‘I start every season with the goal to win a trophy’ – Harry Kane opens up on wait for first title
arts.sum: Bayern Munich centre-forward Harry Kane (31) has opened up to France Football on his wait for a first major trophy. The England international is yet to win a title for…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Thomas Müller is “not a backup” per Vincent Kompany, could be back for 2025/26
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany wants to be very clear about something — Thomas Müller is still a very important part of the team. The Bayern Munich boss has definitive words about his veteran player...

arts.ttl: Injury Update: Bayern Munich’s Daniel Peretz expected to miss two weeks; Javier Fernández back in training
arts.sum: Meanwhile, Hau (via @iMiaSanMia ) also reported that midfielder Javier Fernández is back in training after a long spell on the sidelines due to an ankle injury. Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany check in with some words on Neuer’s status as well (via @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Lazio in advanced talks for Ibrahimovic deal with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Lazio are reportedly in advanced negotiations with Bayern Munich over a possible deal for teenage...
Bayern Munich are said to be close to agreeing a deal with Lazio that would see youngster Arijon Ibrahimovic move to Italy on a loan with a purchase obligation.

arts.ttl: Lazio close in on deal to sign Bayern Munich’s Arijon Ibrahimović
arts.sum: According to Alfredo Pedullà of Sport Italia, Lazio are closing in on a deal to sign Bayern Munich forward Arijon Ibrahimović. It is understood that the Serie A side are…
